hero.title: Your AI Sales Assistant
hero.subtitle: Automate your sales funnel with AI-powered conversations. Handle objections, guide prospects, and close deals — 24/7.

features.title: Everything you need to close more deals

salesFunnel.title: Smart Sales Funnel
salesFunnel.description: AI guides your prospects through every stage of the sales funnel automatically.

objections.title: Objection Handling
objections.description: Trained on proven sales techniques to overcome any prospect objection.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Communicate with clients in 5 languages: English, Polish, Spanish, German, Ukrainian.

integrations.title: CRM Integrations
integrations.description: Seamless integration with Google Calendar, Trello, Hubstaff and online shops.

knowledgeBase.title: Custom Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.description: Build your own knowledge base for the AI to reference during conversations.

analytics.title: Conversation Analytics
analytics.description: Track funnel performance, conversion rates, and customer engagement metrics.

chat.title: Sales Chat
chat.noMessages: Start a conversation with your AI sales assistant

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.noDocuments: No documents yet. Add your first document to enhance AI responses.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Perfect for solo entrepreneurs and small teams getting started with AI-assisted sales. Automate routine conversations and never miss a lead.

pro.name: Professional
pro.description: For growing teams that need full CRM coverage, a custom knowledge base, and unlimited AI conversations to scale their sales pipeline.

business.name: Business
business.description: Built for companies that want a fully branded AI sales experience, dedicated support, API access, and custom model training tailored to their product.
